topics.name: personal data
topics.description: Information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person that the organization collects or handles.

topics.name: processing activities
topics.description: The operations performed on personal data (collection, storage, use, disclosure, deletion) and their documented purposes.

topics.name: consent
topics.description: The lawful basis of obtaining and recording a data subject's agreement to specific processing of their personal data.

topics.name: data retention
topics.description: How long personal data is kept before it is deleted or anonymized, and the policy governing that schedule.

topics.name: data sharing
topics.description: Disclosing or transferring personal data to third parties or across borders, and the safeguards that apply.
